title: Calamaria savatieri
properties: Calamaria savatieri, a species of sea snake, has been reported to have some therapeutic properties due to the presence of compounds like phospholipase A2. However, the exact therapeutic properties and the extent of their benefits have not been extensively studied. Some studies suggest that extracts from the venom of Calamaria savatieri may have anticoagulant and anti-inflammatory properties. Nevertheless, the use of the venom or extracts from this snake for therapeutic purposes should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional. Further research is needed to fully understand the potential benefits and risks of using Calamaria savatieri venom or extracts for therapeutic purposes.
